metadata.task_title: Save a chart from Excel as an image and insert into PowerPoint
metadata.instruction: Insert the bar chart visualization from Task ID 63.xlsx into PowerPoint Task ID 63.pptx, both in Documents > Task 63 Folder.
metadata.context: I want my data visualized in a presentation.

actions.window_title: claude-cua-low-vision.py - Computer-Use-Agents - Visual Studio Code - Untracked [Administrator]

focused_element.name: Terminal 9, python Use Alt+F1 for terminal accessibility help

l5.rationale: The trace begins by opening and bringing the PowerPoint deck to the canvas, establishing the destination file for the chart insertion.

l4.rationale: Switched to Insert and chose chart options from the gallery to start adding a chart visualization to the spreadsheet.
